title: mariscus iridifolius
intro: Mariscus iridifolius, also known as the Yellow Flag or Yellow Flag Iris, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mariscus iridifolius include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
